dialog.text: Hey, stranger. Haven't seen you around. You looking to trade, or just passing through?

option.text: Got anything to trade? I can barter for food or ammo.
Just passing. Watch your back — mutants at night.

dialog.text: I'm heading toward the old mill. Pay a few rubles and I'll escort you through the swamp.

option.text: Sounds good. I'll pay for the escort.

dialog.text: I heard the bar near the Cordon is paying well for artifacts. Keep an eye out near the anomaly fields, but don't get greedy.
Listen: at night the territory gets worse. If you value your head, find a safe house before dusk.

option.text: I can handle myself. Thanks anyway.
